mapper.select: SELECT policy_key AS policyKey, use_yn AS useYn, threshold_int AS thresholdInt, reward_points AS rewardPoints, cap_int AS capInt FROM point_policy_setting ORDER BY FIELD(policy_key, 'SIGNUP', 'FREE_BOARD_POST', 'BOARD_COMMENT_FIRST', 'BOARD_COMMENT_EXTRA', 'NOTICE_COMMENT_FIRST', 'NOTICE_COMMENT_EXTRA', 'FREE_BOARD_LIKE')
SELECT policy_key AS policyKey, use_yn AS useYn, threshold_int AS thresholdInt, reward_points AS rewardPoints, cap_int AS capInt FROM point_policy_setting WHERE policy_key = #{policyKey}
mapper.update: UPDATE point_policy_setting SET use_yn = #{useYn}, threshold_int = #{thresholdInt}, reward_points = #{rewardPoints}, cap_int = #{capInt}, modify_dt = NOW() WHERE policy_key = #{policyKey}
